steps.title: Deployed the website on a k8s cluster
steps.description: This allowed us to establish a scalable and resilient project architecture from the start.

steps.title: Universal setup
steps.description: Created a setup that will be reused in future projects of various sizes.

steps.title: Optimized the costs of hosting
steps.description: Additionally, we set the goal of making cluster maintenance cost-effective without sacrificing stability.
